description: Phase 66.4 partial - Add Next.js to QuantSync and create App Router foundation with shared shell. QuantSync currently has NO Next.js (it's just React + Fastify). The 7 'newer' apps (quantai, quantchat, quantmail, quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet) all use Next.js 15.5. QuantSync needs to be upgraded to match. Add Next.js, create app/ directory with layout.tsx using AppShell from @quant/shared-ui, and migrate the feed page as the first route. Keep the backend (Fastify) alongside but update the build/dev scripts for Next.js.
steps: 1. Read apps/quantai/package.json as the reference for what a Next.js app's package.json looks like in this monorepo (dependencies, scripts, etc.).
2. Read apps/quantai/next.config.mjs (or .js) as the reference for next config in this monorepo.

3. Update apps/quantsync/package.json: add 'next' (^15.5.16) to dependencies. Update scripts: build -> 'next build', dev -> 'next dev -p 3003', typecheck stays 'tsc --noEmit'. Add @tanstack/react-query if not present.
4. Create apps/quantsync/next.config.mjs with transpilePackages for workspace packages (@quant/shared-ui, @quant/brand, @quant/common, etc.).
5. Create apps/quantsync/src/app/globals.css with Tailwind imports (copy pattern from quantai).

6. Create apps/quantsync/src/app/layout.tsx following quantai pattern: import Inter font, metadata, html/body wrapper, QueryProvider + AppProviders (ThemeProvider + CommandPalette from @quant/shared-ui).
8. Create apps/quantsync/src/providers/app-providers.tsx (ThemeProvider + CommandPaletteUI + Cmd+K handler, following quantai pattern).

9. Create apps/quantsync/src/app/page.tsx - a simplified feed page that uses @quant/shared-ui Card, Button, Avatar components. Import the api-client service for data fetching. Show skeleton/loading/error/empty states.
10. Update apps/quantsync/turbo.json: change build outputs to ['.next/**', '!.next/cache/**'] since it's now a Next.js app.
11. Update apps/quantsync/tsconfig.json to include the app/ directory in 'include' and add Next.js-specific settings (jsx: preserve for Next, or keep react-jsx if using app router without pages).
12. Run pnpm install (to add Next.js) then pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/quantsync && pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/quantsync to verify.
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantsync/src/app/page.tsx exists and renders feed content
findings: LoadingState from @quant/shared-ui uses 'text' prop not 'message'. Renamed src/pages/ to src/legacy-pages/ to avoid Next.js Pages Router conflict with existing React component files. All 93 tests pass. Prettier auto-formatted some files via lint-staged pre-commit hook.
